Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 101

CINE420 French Cinema: A Cultural Approach (in Translation) (3 Credits) A study of French culture, civilization, and literature through the medium of film. Taught in English.

Cross-listed with: FREN480.

Credit Only Granted for. FREN480, CINE420 or FILM420.
